title: SpeakEasy - AAC Communication
shortDescription: AI-powered communication app for non-verbal individuals. 100% offline, 100% free.
fullDescription:
SpeakEasy is a free, AI-powered Augmentative and Alternative Communication (AAC) app designed to help non-verbal individuals communicate effectively.

TRADITIONAL AAC DEVICES COST $8,000-$15,000.
SpeakEasy is FREE and works 100% OFFLINE.

KEY FEATURES:

🤖 Smart AI Predictions
On-device AI learns from context (time, location, habits) to suggest the phrases you need most. No internet required.

🔒 Complete Privacy
All data stays on YOUR device. No accounts, no tracking, no data collection. Your conversations remain private.

😊 Emotion-Aware
Select your current mood and get supportive phrases tailored to how you're feeling.

🚨 Emergency Support
One-tap emergency button alerts caregivers instantly when you need help.

🌍 20 Languages Supported
English, Korean, Japanese, Spanish, French, German, Portuguese, Russian, Arabic, Hindi, and more.

♿ Fully Accessible
Designed with accessibility in mind: large touch targets, high contrast mode, haptic feedback, and screen reader support.

WHO IS THIS FOR?
• People with autism spectrum disorder
• Stroke survivors
• People with cerebral palsy
• People with ALS/motor neuron disease
• Anyone who needs communication support

100% FREE. NO ADS. NO SUBSCRIPTIONS.

"70 million people deserve a voice. SpeakEasy makes it possible."
